series_metadata.series_title: Office of Information Technology Project Documentation
series_metadata.series_description: Series consists of documents related to project charters, risk reports, status updates, & project requirements.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Maintain in operating system for 5 years after project is closed or decision is made not to implement. ; Paper: Maintain in office for 5 years after project is closed or decision is made not to implement., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
